qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_excepcion as oi_excepcion, SEC.policy, t0.oi_excepcion as CODE, t0.oi_excepcion as TEXT, t0.oi_personal as oi_personal FROM EDD04_EXCEPCIONES as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Evaluacion2.Excep_Mails.EXCEPCION\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_excepcion LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_excepcion asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_excepcion as oi_excepcion, SEC.policy FROM EDD04_EXCEPCIONES as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Evaluacion2.Excep_Mails.EXCEPCION\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_excepcion LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_excepcion asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Evaluacion2.Excep_Mails.EXCEPCION.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Evaluacion2.Excep_Mails.EXCEPCION.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(EDD04_EXCEPCIONES.oi_excepcion) as CNT from EDD04_EXCEPCIONES Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and EDD04_EXCEPCIONES.oi_excepcion={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(EDD04_EXCEPCIONES.oi_excepcion,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(EDD04_EXCEPCIONES.oi_excepcion,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('SELECT EDD04_EXCEPCIONES.oi_excepcion as ID, PER01_PERSONAL.c_personal as COD, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom as DES FROM EDD04_EXCEPCIONES, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN EDD04_EXCEPCIONES.oi_personal LEFT OUTER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE EDD04_EXCEPCIONES.oi_excepcion in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %})')/ROWS/ROW
